title: Reliquified Artifacts
description: Compatibility addon between Relics and Artifacts
body:
![Mod art](https://i.imgur.com/IotJWtB.png)

RAR-Compat (Relics: Artifacts Compat) redefines the mechanics of the Artifacts mod by incorporating them into the more complex and layered systems of Relics. Instead of simply adding randomly generated gear, this addon transforms Artifacts items to match Relics' deep leveling system, introducing new subtleties and mechanics. This mod is still in development and currently converts only 35% artifacts into relics. But there will be more coming soon, so stay tuned! 


This mod requires Relics and Artifacts!
